ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the individual in the wealth list */,
  "net_worth" TEXT /* Net worth of the individual in USD */,
  "wealth_change" TEXT /* Change in net worth of the individual in USD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" TEXT /* Revenue growth rate of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_company_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., founder, CEO, major shareholder) */,
  "owned_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned by the individual in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_company_associations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_company_associations_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_of_wealth" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of wealth */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source of wealth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the source of wealth (e.g., inheritance, entrepreneurship, investment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_of_wealth_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_worth_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net worth history entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "net_worth" TEXT /* Net worth of the individual in USD */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the net worth entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_worth_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue in USD */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Annual profit in USD */,
  "assets" TEXT /* Total assets in USD */,
  "liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities in USD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Operating margin of the company */,
  "roe" TEXT /* Return on equity (ROE) of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "valuation" TEXT /* Valuation of the company in USD */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "valuation_multiple" TEXT /* Valuation multiple (e.g., P/E ratio, EV/EBITDA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_valuations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industry_associations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industry_associations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES company_industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the portfolio (e.g., income generation, capital appreciation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the holding in USD */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the holding in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the portfolio in USD */,
  "return" TEXT /* Return on investment (ROI) in percentage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "benchmark_return" TEXT /* Return of the benchmark index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial advisor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company (if applicable) */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual (if applicable) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price entry */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening stock price */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest stock price */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest stock price */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing stock price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
